focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Margo begins as a commanding presence, fiercely guarding her autonomy and image, but gradually unravels under the weight of professional erosion and emotional isolation, her confidence giving way to suspicion and vulnerability. As Eve insinuates herself into every facet of Margo's life—endorsed by Bill, enabled by allies, and celebrated in her absence—Margo's resistance collapses into defiance, leaving her publicly scorned and privately adrift, her identity slipping beyond her grasp.
